description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The cabinet features a rich walnut finish, with clean lines and a smooth, flat top surface suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. On one side, there is a large black panel, likely a sliding or drop-down door, while the other side has two horizontal cutout handles indicating the presence of drawers or sliding doors. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall construction appears solid, with no visible glass or metal elements, and the design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing for urban interiors or public spaces. The cabinet's compartments are fully enclosed, with no visible contents.
description: A modern, walnut-finished wooden cabinet with a black panel and cutout handles, featuring a sleek, minimalist design and short legs. The cabinet offers enclosed storage with both door and drawer elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large black panel on the left and a solid wood section on the right, with the cabinet's top and legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow, rectangular profile and the wood grain pattern, with no visible handles or panels.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing two horizontal cutout handles, indicating drawers or sliding doors, and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side with no visible features.
